creator: pfg@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Tijl Coosemans from comment #9)
Wow ... This was a *lot* smoother than I thought:

# pkg delete openssl
Checking integrity... done (0 conflicting)
Deinstallation has been requested for the following 1 packages (of 0 packages in the universe):

Installed packages to be REMOVED:
        openssl-1.0.2k_1,1

Number of packages to be removed: 1

The operation will free 12 MiB.

Proceed with deinstalling packages? [y/N]: y
[1/1] Deinstalling openssl-1.0.2k_1,1...
[1/1] Deleting files for openssl-1.0.2k_1,1: 100%
____

I was expecting a dependency hell.

Now both FreeCAD and qbitorrent are working!
